rationale: The proposed change concerns the Tax Code §11.13(b) residence homestead exemption amount. Educ. Code §21.0443 governs educator preparation program approval and renewal standards. The two provisions address entirely unrelated subject matters with no overlapping operative text or dependency.
quote: Sec. 21.0443. EDUCATOR PREPARATION PROGRAM APPROVAL AND RENEWAL.
_note: No relationship between the proposed homestead exemption increase and educator preparation program rules; no conflict identified.
